docs.text: utils.py distribute_prob(n, total_prob=1.0, sigma=1.0) -> np.ndarray parameters: n => No of parts to distribute into total_prob => Sum of n probabilities sigma => Variance of probabilities returns: np.ndarray[n] => n number of probabilities with a random peak
